title: × hemionanthes gryphus
intro: × Hemionanthes gryphus, also known as the Chinese parasol or parasol tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alseuosmiaceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to clear heat, reduce fever, and alleviate swelling. The health benefits of × Hemionanthes gryphus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce coughing, and promote overall well-being. × Hemionanthes gryphus is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and supplements.
